featured.title: My Favorite Album Covers

islands.name: The Story
islands.description: About me and my journey through Marlboro High School.
islands.content: I am Joseph Friedman, a Senior at Marlboro High School in the Web Design Pathway Program. Over the past three years, I have evolved from learning basic HTML to building complex interactive experiences. My passion lies in combining technical skill with creative vision.

islands.name: The Horizon
islands.description: Looking forward to the future after high school.
islands.content: As I prepare to graduate, I am excited to dive deeper into the world of tech and design. I plan to continue my education in computer science and creative technologies, aiming to build tools that push the boundaries of the digital landscape. The web is my canvas, and I am just getting started.

islands.name: AI Logic
islands.description: Documentation of AI usage in my creative process.

prompts.prompt: How can I implement collision detection in Three.js?
prompts.reflection: AI helped me understand the mathematical concepts behind 3D collision.

prompts.prompt: Design a warm terracotta color palette.
prompts.reflection: AI assisted in matching colors for a specific 'warm' aesthetic.
